headline: CAT Holds Dividend Steady For Now: Is a Hike Around the Corner?
summary: Caterpillar keeps dividend unchanged. A record backlog and renewed earnings growth reinforce confidence in its cash flow strength and an imminent hike.

headline: Pentair: One Of The Best Ways To Play The Secular Growth Theme In Water
summary: Pentair has a very good financial position. The long-term debt/equity ratio is 0.4, while the interest coverage ratio is 12. See why I rate PNR stock a buy.
